reproduction_method: Read-only verification of every checksum-sealed artifact, Git tree identity, metric extraction, and evaluator path audit. The old writer was not rerun because it hard-codes the immutable namespace and contains volatile timestamps/runtime fields.

baselines.B2: absent: no frozen same-row raw LLM cache or model configuration
baselines.B3: absent: no frozen same-row panel cache
baselines.B8: absent: no leakage-safe same-row specialist predictions

cold_start.verdict: only one small cold-start win; gate failed

transfer.opinionqa: excluded because option index has no stable polarity
transfer.verdict: two catastrophic semantically weak transfers; both remain prior evidence

execution.limitation: terminal effect was a constructed action counter, not a real downstream outcome

why_B7_nearly_equals_B6: the real-row runner passes one point world per decision
past_actions is always empty and the world is not persistent
candidate actions receive the same generic consequence structure
the fitted pack carries action intercepts but not meaningful feature effects into B7
actor shrinkage is effectively zero in B7
policy-family weights are hard-coded rather than likelihood-fitted
execution happens after the scored action distribution and cannot add one-step predictive lift

real_row_state_gaps.relationships: identifier present but no empirical relationship state consumed

ablation_audit: At least twelve state/family/execution ablations were explicitly identical or unavailable; only calibration materially changed predictions on some domains. The prior non-ornamental-state gate failed.
bootstrap_audit: Prior paired bootstrap resampled trajectory rows with frequency weights rather than actor, relationship, sequence, or headline clusters.
aggregation_audit: No equal-domain primary aggregate was present; pooled impression weighting could allow Upworthy to dominate.
